name: Oyster Casserole
recipeInstructions:
As garnish: Lemon or Lime wedges
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Mix oysters and tomatoes; arrange in an ungreased rectangular baking dish, 11 x 7 x 1 1/2 inches.
3. Pour 1/4 cup of the half and half over the mixture.
4. Mix remaining ingredients except lemon wedges; sprinkle over oysters and tomatoes.
5. Pour remaining half and half over crumb mixture.
6. Bake uncovered for about 30 minutes or until light brown.
7. Garnish with lemon wedges.
